name: Rock Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Punch holes at the top edge of an 8-inch square pan and lace about 7 strings from one side to the other. Place the laced pan in a pan deep enough to catch any leaking syrup.
2. Dissolve sugar in water and cook without stirring until the temperature reaches the hard ball stage (247-252°F).
3. Pour the syrup into the laced pan, ensuring it reaches a level about 3/4 inches above the strings.
4. Cover the surface with a piece of foil.
5. Allow the mixture to sit undisturbed for several days to allow crystallization to occur.
6. Carefully lift out the laced pan and cut the strings.
7. Dislodge the rock candy pieces from the strings.
8. Rinse quickly in cold water and place on racks in a very low oven to dry.
